title: Toadpole
move_pattern: Cycles through Whirl → Spiken → Spike Spit. Starting move depends on position: front placement starts with Spiken, otherwise starts with Whirl.
notes: Toadpole applies and removes its Thorns power in a predictable pattern. Spiken applies 2 Thorns for defense, Spike Spit removes those 2 Thorns before attacking. The initial move changes based on whether the Toadpole is positioned at the front or back.
